case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. BRANDON JASON TRUSSELL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRANDON JASON TRUSSELL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUSSELL, BRANDON JASON $1,715.93 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,815.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,715.93 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TRUSSELL, BRANDON JASON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JAN-13-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRUSSELL, BRANDON JASON
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
